creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine update to new version 3.1.0

Announce Message:

   "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.1.0. This version has a new setup
    mechanism and supports BLOBstreaming and the Swekey hardware
    authentication.

    Downloads/details on http://phpmyadmin.net.

    Marc Delisle, for the team"

ChangeLog:

    http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=643509
